provenance: Derived material: meltsTo target of chromatis (ARCHITECTURE section 10). All numbers invented for v0 balance, needs Eli's blessing.
notes: Deliberately does NOT carry the 'liquid' tag: the loader invariant 'liquid tag => boilsTo' would demand a vapor id outside the v0 vocabulary, and the phorys reaction ('any liquid tag') would otherwise fire on molten metal. valueCp 5000/unit x 7 yield units = 35000, slightly below the 40000 solid block - melting is lossy on purpose.
